style_patterns.sentence_structure: Action-verb-led bullets with multi-clause detail and measurable outcomes
examples: Delivered structured programming instruction across multiple Melbourne schools, teaching JavaScript, C, Java and Python to 12–20 students per session
Architected a server-side routing engine to dispatch 16 specialised agents based on pipeline state, eliminating race conditions and reducing latency from LLM-based routing
Planned and delivered community programs engaging 500+ youth across multiple Victorian suburbs, supporting leadership development, engagement, and wellbeing initiatives

flagged_issues.description: Header line contains non-standard separator characters that can break ATS/contact parsing.
Current role uses past tense construction; present-tense phrasing would improve consistency for ongoing responsibilities.
flagged_issues.original: Planned and delivered community programs engaging 500+ youth across multiple Victorian suburbs, supporting leadership development, engagement, and wellbeing initiatives
flagged_issues.suggested: Plan and deliver community programs engaging 500+ youth across multiple Victorian suburbs, supporting leadership development, engagement, and wellbeing initiatives

flagged_issues.description: Current project entry marked Present uses past-tense opening verb.
flagged_issues.original: Collaborated with a Product Owner and senior engineering consultant to design a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system for generating ATS-compliant job application materials
flagged_issues.suggested: Collaborate with a Product Owner and senior engineering consultant to design a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system for generating ATS-compliant job application materials

flagged_issues.description: Bullet is information-dense and can be tightened for faster recruiter scanning.
flagged_issues.original: Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference, facilitating structured dialogue between youth and community elders on mental health and community issues, achieving 50+ attendees and 4.5/5 satisfaction rating
flagged_issues.suggested: Led the Intergenerational Conversations Youth Conference, facilitating dialogue between youth and community elders on mental health and community issues; achieved 50+ attendees and a 4.5/5 satisfaction rating

flagged_issues.description: Hyphenated compound adjective contains spacing error.
Hyphenated time expression contains spacing error.
